SEARCH
Package io.vertigo.core.lang

Interface BasicTypeAdapter<J,B>

Type Parameters:
J - Custom Java type (e.g. EmailAddress, GeoPoint)
B - Basic type for storage (e.g. String, Integer)
public interface BasicTypeAdapter<J,B>
Type adapter for converting between basic and custom Java types. Enables storage and handling of custom types by mapping them to supported basic types: - Numbers (Integer, Long, Double, BigDecimal) - Boolean values - Text (String) - Dates (LocalDate, Instant) - Binary data (DataStream) Example: EmailAddress (custom) invalid input: '<'-> String (basic) Adapters must handle null values correctly.
Author:
pchretien

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    getBasicType()
    Gets the basic type used for storage.
    B

    Converts from custom Java type to basic type.
    J

    Converts from basic type to custom Java type.

  • Method Details

    • toJava

      J toJava(B basicValue, Class<J> javaType)
      Converts from basic type to custom Java type.
      Parameters:
      basicValue - Value in basic type format
      javaType - Target Java class
      Returns:
      Converted value in custom type

    • toBasic

      B toBasic(J javaValue)
      Converts from custom Java type to basic type.
      Parameters:
      javaValue - Custom type value (may be null)
      Returns:
      Value converted to basic type

    • getBasicType

      BasicType getBasicType()
      Gets the basic type used for storage.
      Returns:
      Basic type for this adapter
